rationale: The cited 2006 paper appears only as one item in a grouped citation used to justify including page views as a control in the empirical model. The citing article does not build its attribution formulation, optimization derivations, or core claims on that paper's framework or findings. There is no direct reuse of the cited paper's model, measures, or heterogeneity decomposition in the main analysis. This indicates a background/supporting mention rather than a meaningful directional dependence.
